spec.name: concurrent_manifest_auditor
spec.description: Spawns 6 subagents, each reading one dependency manifest and returning the single UNGUESSABLE suspicious package name. Afterward collates results into audit.md with one line per manifest: '<manifest_filename>: <suspicious_package>'.

subagent_config.instructions: For the assigned manifest file, read its contents. Identify the one UNGUESSABLE suspicious package (e.g. a typosquatted or unusual dependency). Return only the package name. No explanation. After all 6 subagents finish, the main agent writes <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-03-budget-audit__pull_min_governance__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/audit.md with exactly 6 lines, each formatted as '<manifest_filename>: <package>', using the filenames deps_api.txt, deps_web.txt, deps_cli.txt, deps_worker.txt, deps_auth.txt, deps_billing.txt.

request.rationale: No existing tool supports spawning concurrent subagents. The objective explicitly requires concurrent auditing of 6 independent dependency manifests to find unguessable suspicious packages within an 8-iteration budget.

subagent.task: No existing tool supports spawning concurrent subagents. The objective explicitly requires concurrent auditing of 6 independent dependency manifests to find unguessable suspicious packages within an 8-iteration budget.
